arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim unhappy with Onana’s performances for Man Utd
arts.sum: The staff feel that Onana is someone who could be upgraded but it is also acknowledged that United would rather not have to spend money on the goalkeeper position in the summer. Ruben Amorim and his coaching staff are unhappy with the performances of Andre Onana .

arts.ttl: Manchester United confirmed squad members vs Ipswich Town
arts.sum: Man United's players started to arrive at Old Trafford at around 3.30pm ahead of tonight's game with relegation-threatened Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Man Utd plan two controversial matches to boost revenues after 'madness' jibe
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will take Manchester United's squad to Malaysia and Hong Kong for post-season friendlies in May before heading to the United States for pre-season in July

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: Luke Shaw, Mason Mount updates provided amid concerns surrounding English duo
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim admits that he is unsure when either Luke Shaw or Mason Mount could be available for selection.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make decision on future of interim transfer guru
arts.sum: Manchester United are believed to have appointed interim director of recruitment Christopher Vivell on a permanent ‘multi-year’ contract as hierarchical adjustments at Old Trafford continue.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano confirms Victor Osimhen’s Man Utd stance
arts.sum: Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Victor Osimhen is open to discussing a summer transfer to Manchester United .

arts.ttl: How to watch Man Utd v Ipswich Town on TV tonight - live stream details
arts.sum: Coverage for Manchester United v Ipswich begins at 6.30pm.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim defends much-criticised Red Devils star amid talk of summer exit
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim throws his support behind Rasmus Hojlund amid the ongoing criticism surrounding the centre-forward, who is being linked with a move to Napoli.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Ipswich live early team news plus how to watch and kick-off time
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Live updates from Old Trafford as Man United take on Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: Man United plan money-spinning post-season trip to Asia amid Ruben Amorim "engine" claim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United could be set to follow Tottenham and Newcastle in planning post-season friendlies following their controversial trip to Australia last May
